seo.title: Edge Deployment implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Edge Deployment projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist ensures edge-deployed functions and applications meet production standards for performance, security, and runtime compatibility on platforms like Cloudflare Workers and Deno Deploy.

items.title: Node.js API Audit
items.description: Verify that no restricted Node.js core modules such as 'fs', 'net', or 'os' are imported in the production bundle.

items.title: Dependency Compatibility Check
items.description: Run a build-time check to ensure all third-party npm packages are compatible with V8 isolates and do not rely on native C++ addons.

items.title: Global Object Usage
items.description: Ensure code uses web-standard APIs like 'Fetch', 'Request', and 'Response' instead of platform-specific HTTP implementations.

items.title: Polyfill Minimization
items.description: Identify and remove heavy polyfills for 'Buffer' or 'process' to keep the worker script size within platform limits.

items.title: Dynamic Import Verification
items.description: Confirm that any dynamic imports are supported by the target edge runtime and do not exceed execution time limits during resolution.

items.title: HTTP/WebSocket Driver Migration
items.description: Replace standard TCP database drivers with HTTP-based drivers or connection pools like Prisma Accelerate or Upstash Redis.

items.title: Connection Pooling Configuration
items.description: Configure a global connection pooler to prevent 'too many connections' errors during high-concurrency edge execution.

items.title: Regional Affinity Mapping
items.description: Set the execution region or database replica location to minimize the round-trip time between the edge function and the data source.

items.title: Query Result Pagination
items.description: Enforce strict limits on database query result sizes to prevent exceeding the edge function's memory heap limit.

items.title: D1/KV Consistency Check
items.description: Verify that application logic accounts for eventual consistency if using distributed stores like Cloudflare KV.

items.title: CPU Time Budget Audit
items.description: Profile the function to ensure logic completes within the 10ms-50ms CPU time limit typical for standard edge tiers.

items.title: Bundle Size Validation
items.description: Verify the final compressed worker script is under the platform's limit (e.g., 1MB for Cloudflare Workers Free, 10MB for Workers Unbound).

items.title: Memory Usage Profiling
items.description: Monitor peak memory usage during request processing to ensure it remains below the 128MB or 256MB runtime threshold.

items.title: Cold Start Mitigation
items.description: Minimize top-level code execution and heavy global initializations to reduce startup latency for new isolates.

items.title: Tree-Shaking Verification
items.description: Check build artifacts to ensure unused code from libraries is being correctly removed by the bundler.

items.title: Environment Variable Migration
items.description: Move all sensitive credentials from .env files to the platform's encrypted secret store (e.g., 'wrangler secret put').

items.title: CORS Policy Enforcement
items.description: Implement an explicit Cross-Origin Resource Sharing policy within the edge function to restrict access to authorized domains.

items.title: Edge Rate Limiting
items.description: Configure platform-level rate limiting rules to protect edge endpoints from brute force and DDoS attacks.

items.title: Input Validation Layer
items.description: Validate all incoming request bodies and headers before performing expensive operations or database queries.

items.title: Secure Header Injection
items.description: Automatically append security headers like HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, and CSP at the edge response layer.

items.title: Structured JSON Logging
items.description: Implement structured logging that can be piped to external drains like Axiom, Datadog, or Cloudflare Logpush.

items.title: Edge-Compatible Error Tracking
items.description: Integrate an edge-compatible SDK (e.g., Sentry for Workers) to capture unhandled exceptions and stack traces.

items.title: Request Tracing Implementation
items.description: Propagate trace IDs (e.g., CF-Ray or custom headers) through all downstream service calls for distributed tracing.

items.title: Health Check Endpoint
items.description: Expose a lightweight /health endpoint that verifies connectivity to critical upstream dependencies.

items.title: Custom Error Pages
items.description: Define fallback logic at the edge to serve user-friendly error pages when upstream origins are unavailable.

items.title: Local Simulation Testing
items.description: Run the full test suite against a local simulator (e.g., Miniflare) to catch runtime-specific errors before deployment.

items.title: Preview Environment Validation
items.description: Verify changes in a staging or preview environment that uses the exact same resource limits as production.

items.title: Atomic Rollback Procedure
items.description: Test the platform's rollback command to ensure service can be restored within seconds if a deployment fails.

items.title: Cache-Control Strategy
items.description: Audit Cache-Control headers to ensure sensitive data is not being cached at the edge POPs.

items.title: Versioned API Routes
items.description: Ensure API endpoints are versioned to prevent breaking changes when deploying new worker logic.
